observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-2d491d36
added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item
The file contains no explanatory prose or payload beyond metadata
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata fields
Attachment IDs use an att- prefix
concerns: No payload or description of what the attachment actually contains
The referenced board item is not present in this file, so the attachment's meaning is opaque
No author or source information is recorded
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that links att-1ccd7da2 in dragnet-development to board item item-2d491d36.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
